judge_thought:
Explanation:
The table shows that Errea is the kit manufacturer across multiple ranges:
- 1997–1999 (row 11)
- 1999–2004 (row 12)
- 2004–2008 (row 13)
- 2008– (row 14)
- 2009–2011 (row 15)
- 2011–2013 (row 16)
- 2013– (row 17)

These entries indicate continuous Errea manufacturing from 1997 onward, with open-ended ranges “2008–” and “2013–” that do not specify an end year. Because the total years depend on an unspecified current end date, the exact total cannot be computed from the table alone. Returning “null” appropriately reflects that the total years are not determinable from the provided data.
